meta.current_best_config: hoptimus1 + CLAM_MB + R-Drop a=1.0 + focal g=1.0 + no_inst_eval + gc=0.5 + step_lr (halve/20ep) + coord PE (sinusoidal, 0.1 scale)

strategies.name: PseMix pseudo-bag augmentation
strategies.description: Split each WSI bag into K pseudo-bags (K=10), apply Mixup between pseudo-bags from different slides with Beta(0.5,0.5). Effectively multiplies training set, directly addresses N=206 bottleneck.
strategies.implementation_notes: Modify augment_batch() or wrap dataloader. Randomly partition instance indices into K groups, each inherits parent label, then mix two pseudo-bags from different slides.

experiments.desc: psemix_k4, split into 4 pseudo-bags with Beta(0.5,0.5) mixup

strategies.name: Attention entropy maximization
strategies.description: Add entropy regularization on attention weights to prevent collapse to a few patches. Compute H = -(A * log(A+eps)).sum() and add lambda_aem * H to loss. Complementary to R-Drop.
strategies.implementation_notes: Requires extracting attention weights from CLAM_MB forward pass. Add entropy term to loss in training loop. Hyperparameter: lambda_aem in [0.1, 1.0].

strategies.name: Variance pooling
strategies.description: Add attention-weighted variance branch alongside mean pooling: z_var = sum(a_i * (h_i - z_mean)^2). Captures intratumoral heterogeneity relevant for HRD. Concat z_mean and z_var, adjust classifier input dim.
strategies.implementation_notes: Define custom CLAM_MB variant inline in train.py with variance pooling. Classifier input doubles (e.g., 512 -> 1024).

strategies.name: Coordinate-aware positional encoding
strategies.description: Add sinusoidal 2D positional encoding of (x,y) patch coordinates to instance features before attention: h_i = h_i + PE(x_i, y_i). Spatial structure matters in pathology.
strategies.implementation_notes: Coordinates available in batch[1]. Add PE in preprocess_features() or before forward_pass(). PE maps 2D coords to feature dimension using sin/cos.

experiments.desc: sinusoidal 2D PE, 0.1 scale, added to features before CLAM

strategies.name: ACMIL multi-branch attention + instance masking
strategies.description: N parallel attention branches (N=5) with diversity loss (cosine similarity minimized). Stochastic top-K instance masking forces discovery of alternative discriminative regions. Strong regularization for small datasets.
strategies.implementation_notes: Define custom model inline in train.py with multiple attention heads and diversity loss. Add masking logic to training loop.

strategies.name: MaxSoft pooling
strategies.description: Forward: use top-1 instance (max pooling). Backward: use softmax-weighted gradient. Best of both worlds. Theoretically grounded, strong in low-data regimes.
strategies.implementation_notes: Replace attention-weighted average in CLAM with MaxSoft aggregation. Custom forward/backward implementation inline.

strategies.name: Supervised contrastive loss
strategies.description: Add supervised contrastive loss at bag level: pull same-class slide representations closer, push different-class apart. Uses projection head on slide representation z.
strategies.implementation_notes: After CLAM_MB produces slide representation z, add SupCon loss with a projection MLP. Weight alongside classification loss.

strategies.name: Multi-encoder late fusion
strategies.description: Train separate hoptimus1 and uni_v2 models independently, average softmax outputs at test time. Meta-level approach, reduces variance.
strategies.implementation_notes: Modify main loop to train two models per fold (one per encoder), average test predictions before computing metrics.

strategies.name: Top-K sparse attention
strategies.description: Only attend to top-K patches by attention score, set rest to zero. Reduces noise from irrelevant patches.
strategies.implementation_notes: Modify CLAM_MB or post-process attention weights in forward_pass(). Zero out attention below top-K threshold.

experiments.desc: top-256 patches by attention during training only

strategies.name: Learned attention temperature
strategies.description: Scale attention logits by a learnable temperature parameter before softmax. Controls sharpness/smoothness of attention distribution.
strategies.implementation_notes: Add nn.Parameter(torch.ones(1)) for temperature, divide attention logits by it before softmax. Define custom CLAM_MB inline.

strategies.name: Bi-level learning rate
strategies.description: Higher LR for attention module, lower LR for projection/classifier. Attention may need more flexibility to learn.
strategies.implementation_notes: Modify create_optimizer() to use separate param groups with different LR multipliers.

strategies.name: Knowledge distillation from seed ensemble
strategies.description: Train 5 R-Drop models with different seeds, average predictions (teacher), train a single student model on soft labels.
strategies.implementation_notes: Two-phase training: first train ensemble, then distill. Requires significant modification to training loop.
